caption: A video presentation titled "The elephant in the mind" features a central image of an elephant walking toward the viewer with a person sitting atop its head. Surrounding the elephant are several smaller diagrams of the human brain with specific regions highlighted and labeled. To the left is a brain image titled "Open-mindedness?" with a highlighted section labeled "PC". To the right is one titled "Subj. Value" with a section labeled "VMPFC". Below these, a small image titled "Fear" points to the "Amygdalae", while a final image titled "Control" points to the "DLPFC". Across the sequence of frames, the visual composition remains entirely static; the placement of the elephant, the brain diagrams, and the accompanying text labels does not change, indicating a still slide used during a presentation.
